scripts.test: npm run clean && npm run exec:chrome
scripts.test:tags: npm run clean && cross-env BROWSER=chrome cucumber-js --tags
scripts.test:chrome: npm run clean && npm run exec:chrome
scripts.test:firefox: npm run clean && npm run exec:firefox
scripts.test:webkit: npm run clean && npm run exec:webkit
scripts.test:mobile: npm run clean && cross-env PLATFORM=mobile cucumber-js -p mobile
scripts.test:api: npm run clean && cross-env PLATFORM=api cucumber-js -p api
scripts.test:all: npm run clean && npm-run-all --continue-on-error --serial exec:chrome exec:firefox exec:webkit test:mobile test:api
